title: vasconcellea stipulata
intro: Vasconcellea stipulata, also known as the tree tomato, is a species of flowering plant native to the Andean region, belonging to the family Salicaceae. The tree tomato has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Vasconcellea stipulata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide protection against certain cancers. Herbal preparations of the tree tomato can be made into jams, preserves, and infusions, which can be consumed fresh or used in various medicinal applications.
